backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the game backend with three endpoints: generateProblem (returns a random arithmetic problem), submitScore (stores a named score with timestamp), and getLeaderboard (returns the top-10 scores sorted by correct answers).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (game screen, start screen, results screen, visual theme) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each component, hook, and style file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Mental Math Trainer' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing navigation between start, game, and results views using local state, passing score and callback props to each screen.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: Custom hook encapsulating all game logic including fetching problems from the actor, tracking score and total answered, managing answer input, and providing feedback flash state.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameTimer.ts: Custom hook managing a 2-minute countdown timer with start/stop controls, formatted time output, progress percentage, urgency flag for the last 30 seconds, and a callback on expiry.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for generating problems, fetching the leaderboard, and submitting scores with automatic leaderboard cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark game-themed design system using OKLCH CSS custom properties for colors, including neon, electric, and accent tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/GameScreen.tsx: Active game screen component that displays arithmetic problems with a countdown timer HUD, handles answer input/submission, tracks score and accuracy, and calls onGameEnd when time expires.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsScreen.tsx: Post-game results screen that shows the player's score with a contextual message, allows name entry and leaderboard score submission, and displays a fetched top-10 leaderboard with rank icons.
frontend/src/pages/StartScreen.tsx: Landing/start screen that displays the MathSprint logo, branding, game rules (2-minute challenge, four operations), and a Start Game button to begin a session.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based game color tokens (neon, electric, orange-accent), custom fonts (Space Grotesk, Inter), neon box shadows, and animation keyframes for game feedback.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the app's summary, existing implemented features, and pending architectural requirements for the MathSprint mental math game including backend problem generation and leaderboard functionality.
